CustomField.description: Base URL of the JotForm that recommenders (coach / professor / internship supervisor) use to upload their recommendation letter. Step 4's recommender request emails append ?appid={app_id}&recType={Coach|Internship}&applicantName={name} so JotForm knows which application and which slot to update on submit.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Paste the public URL of the Recommender JotForm here (without query string). The Confirm Materials flow appends application Id, recommender type, and applicant name as URL parameters.
CustomField.label: Recommender JotForm Base URL
